# CANDIDATE: GAP_AND_GO_CONFLUENCE_FILTER

**Filed:** 2026-05-31
**Filer:** chef-nomotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** new_trigger (specialized entry condition)
**Status:** DRAFT — PENDING SEGMENTATION ANALYSIS

## Hypothesis

GAP_AND_GO day type + CONFLUENCE trigger (≥2 triggers firing simultaneously) identifies a higher-quality subset of GAP_AND_GO trades. The hypothesis is that confluence acts as a quality filter within the already-validated day-type regime, producing +$15+/trade with n≥30.

## Mechanism

**Day-type detection (pre-existing):**
- gap_pct > 0.15%
- first 3 bars hold gap direction (no reversal)

**Entry filter (proposed):**
- TODAY_IS_GAP_AND_GO = True (day-type classifier fires)
- CONFLUENCE = True (≥2 triggers firing on entry bar)
- Optional time-of-day gate: MORNING (09:35-10:55 ET)

**Exit:** Inherits from parent setup (BEARISH_REJECTION or BULLISH_RECLAIM)

## Expected impact on OP-16 anchors

| J day | Current engine behavior | Proposed behavior | Delta |
|---|---|---|---|
| 4/29 winner | Engine enters | Would enter (GAP_AND_GO + confluence) | 0 |
| 5/01 winner | Engine enters | Would enter (GAP_AND_GO + confluence) | 0 |
| 5/04 winner | Engine enters | Would enter (GAP_AND_GO + confluence) | 0 |
| 5/05 loser | Engine enters | Would enter (GAP_AND_GO + confluence) — may still lose | 0 |
| 5/06 loser | Engine enters | Would enter (GAP_AND_GO + confluence) — may still lose | 0 |
| 5/07 loser 1 | Engine enters | Would enter (GAP_AND_GO + confluence) — may still lose | 0 |
| 5/07 loser 2 | Engine enters | Would enter (GAP_AND_GO + confluence) — may still lose | 0 |

**Note:** This filter restricts to GAP_AND_GO days only. If J's anchor days are all GAP_AND_GO, the filter preserves all anchors. If any anchor is NOT GAP_AND_GO, this filter would miss it — requires verification.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** Standard position sizing per risk-rules.md
2. **Sample bias:** 76 trades from day-type classifier OOS; segmentation introduces additional selection bias
3. **Out-of-sample:** OOS trades already held-out; segmentation is post-hoc analysis on OOS data (acceptable for hypothesis generation, needs validation on fresh OOS window)
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS — top sub-slice must be validated against OPRA cache
5. **Failure modes:** If no sub-slice meets threshold, candidate is rejected. If sub-slice meets on segmentation but fails OOS validation, candidate is rejected.
6. **Concentration:** NEEDS-COMPUTE — must verify top-5 days < 80% of sub-slice P&L

## Pre-merge gate

- [ ] Segmentation analysis complete: best sub-slice identified
- [ ] Threshold verification: avg_pnl ≥ +$15 AND n ≥ 30
- [ ] Anchor coverage: all J winners must be GAP_AND_GO (or filter misses them)
- [ ] Real-fills validation on top sub-slice
- [ ] Concentration check: top5 < 80%
- [ ] Fresh OOS validation (walk-forward on sub-slice)

## Confidence

2/10 — Cannot propose until segmentation analysis confirms a sub-slice meets the +$15/n≥30 threshold.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Does not conflict with existing candidates. Complements day-type classifier by adding actionable entry filter.
